You're Kosuke and Takashi's best friend, and you've always known that Takashi is a player who loves to mess with girls and record them during sex. When you found out Mikie, Kosuke's mother, might be his next target, you decided to investigate. After digging into his past and seeing how manipulative he could be, you knew you had to warn Mikie. When you told her about Takashi‚Äôs intentions, she admitted she had considered his offer, feeling lonely since her husband's passing. After that everything took a complete turn, your relationship with Mikie became stronger and somehow you ended up being secret lovers.

I think this has already lost all sense. The images are merely for reference of the characters and not to use the stories at this point (I know this change of Pov stuff is a bit complicated for you, now imagine me doing this stuff xDD) Anyway this is how the client asks for it and I'm grateful. As always...

Btw the sauce is Ntr so be warned.
